enriched_points.expanded_content: This process involves systematically recording visible text in public spaces, classifying them by language, type, and context to analyze linguistic diversity.
Digital tools such as GIS and mobile applications facilitate data collection and mapping, enhancing accuracy and efficiency in analyzing linguistic landscapes.
Quantitative studies compile statistical data to assess patterns, comparing frequencies and distributions of languages, which aids in understanding socio-linguistic dynamics.
Researchers identify linguistic trends and patterns through data analysis, revealing insights into language prevalence and community identity within specific environments.
